The wedge: Zycus modular pricing (iContract + iSource + Merlin AI, tailored to university scale) positioned as cost-effective vs JAGGAER, plus Merlin's negotiation intelligence and contract analytics as the AI differentiator that Bonfire + spreadsheets cannot deliver. Activation: lead the re-engagement with a pricing narrative framed against JAGGAER ('flexible, university-scale pricing'), deliver university case studies (Northeast US schools using Zycus CLM + Merlin), and make the Merlin AI story the centerpiece of the demo to separate from status quo and JAGGAER. north_star_verdict.math: 51 days to close (close date 20 Aug 2026). Created 17 Mar 2026, 105 days old. Time in Qualified stage: 105 days (entire deal lifecycle). No progression past initial contact. Last verified buyer activity: 07 May 2026 (54 days ago). Last buyer call: 17 Mar 2026 (104 days ago). Six rep outreach attempts with zero buyer response over 79 days (31 Mar to 19 Jun).
